song.title: How Great is Our God
song.author: Chris Tomlin
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C B C E
song.lyrics:
[V1] . A 1) The splendor of a King, .F#m Clothed in majesty. . D Let all the earth rejoice, . All the earth rejoice.
He wraps Himself in light, And darkness tries to hide, And trembles at His voice, Trembles at His voice.
[C] .A Chorus How great is our God, sing with me: . F#m How great is our God, and all will see . D E A How great, how great is our God!
[V2] 2) Age to age He stands, And time is in His hands; Beginning and the End, Beginning and the End.
The Godhead Three in One, Father, Spirit, Son, The Lion and the Lamb, The Lion and the Lamb.
[B] Bridge Name above all names, |Worthy of all praise My heart will sing, |How great is our God.
[E] 1) The splendor of a King, Clothed in majesty. Let all the earth rejoice, All the earth rejoice. He wraps Himself in light, And darkness tries to hide And trembles at His voice Trembles at His voice. Chorus How great is our God, sing with me How great is our God, and all will see How great, how great is our God 2) Age to age He stands And time is in His hands Beginning and the end Beginning and the end The Godhead Three in One Father, Spirit, Son The Lion and the Lamb The Lion and the Lamb Bridge Name above all names, Worthy of all praise My heart will sing, How great is our God
